business_ideas.idea: Autonomous underwater robots for seagrass restoration and marine ecosystem monitoring.
Maritime defense drones for cable protection and subsurface monitoring in ocean.
Sustainable cultivated seafood production (sushi-grade salmon grown in lab).
Data infrastructure and underwater cables for internet connectivity.
Submarine treasure hunting with profit-sharing from recovered artifacts.
Marine geoengineering via iron filing ocean seeding for carbon capture.
Data centers submerged in ocean for cooling efficiency.
Unmanned surface vehicles for defense and maritime operations.

predictions.text: China will increasingly use underwater cable cutters for geopolitical advantage, particularly in Pacific theaters.
Ocean economy will see $3T+ annual spend shift toward tech-enabled solutions and automation.
Billion-dollar companies will emerge from ocean robotics and maritime defense tech within decade.
